sub_families.name: description_of_business
sub_families.key_facts: DAL is franchisor of Subway QSR chain in US. Converted to securitized guarantor entity in 2024. Operates under royalty-free license from SUIPH (effective Jun 20, 2024).

sub_families.name: revenue_recognition
sub_families.policy: ASC Topic 606. Royalties recognized as franchisee sales occur (sales-based royalties). Initial franchise fees recognized on straight-line basis over franchise agreement term (deferred revenues). Transfer fees earned upon completion. Direct/incremental costs (commissions) capitalized and amortized over agreement term.

sub_families.name: vendor_funds_revenue
sub_families.policy: Commissions/rebates from preferred vendors based on percentage or volume of franchisee purchases. Recognized in period purchases made. Strategic capital initiative funds received upfront, recognized ratably over contract life.

sub_families.name: master_franchise_agreements
sub_families.policy: MFA royalties based on percentage of master franchisee sales. Royalty percentages vary among markets. MFA revenue = 1% of total revenue in each year.

sub_families.name: cash_and_cash_equivalents
sub_families.policy: All cash investments with original maturity ≤3 months. Placed with several large financial institutions. Balances may exceed FDIC limits.

sub_families.name: restricted_cash
sub_families.policy: Established pursuant to securitized note issuance for benefit of Trustee and noteholders. Primarily cash for interest, principal, and commitment fee reserves.

sub_families.name: accounts_receivable
sub_families.policy: Stated at expected collection amount. Allowance for credit losses based on franchisee creditworthiness, past history, economic trends. No collateral required.

sub_families.name: intangibles
sub_families.policy: Reacquired contract rights (1-20 year life) and noncompete agreements (1-2 year life). Straight-line amortization. Weighted-average life: 7 years (contract rights), 1 year (noncompete).

sub_families.name: impairment
sub_families.policy: Long-lived assets evaluated for impairment when triggering events occur. No impairment identified for 2024 or 2023.

sub_families.name: fair_value_measurements
sub_families.policy: Three-level hierarchy. Material financial instruments (cash, AR, AP) at Level 1 fair value = carrying value.

sub_families.name: income_taxes
sub_families.policy: Disregarded entity — single-member LLC taxed at parent level. Entity-level tax only for certain states. Uncertain tax positions: $1,161K (2024), $1,041K (2023). Accrued interest/penalties: $639K (2024), $519K (2023). Policy: interest/penalties in provision for income taxes.

note_families.key_facts: AR gross $15,170K, allowance $626K, net $14,544K (2024). Prior year: $24,528K gross, $2,148K allowance, $22,380K net.
Contract rights gross $415,565K, accumulated amortization $165,787K, net $249,778K. Noncompetes gross $1,224K, amortization $499K, net $725K. Wrote off $4,796K fully amortized in 2024.

sub_families.name: license_agreement
sub_families.details: License fee to SIP: $245,181K (2024), $445,022K (2023), $365,878K (2022). Subject to guaranteed 4% operating profit margin on defined profit base. Terminated Jun 20, 2024; replaced by royalty-free license from SUIPH.

sub_families.name: management_agreement
sub_families.details: FWH management fee as securitization manager: $49,325K (2024). Commenced in 2024.

sub_families.name: service_agreement_msa
sub_families.details: Administrative support services allocated by percent of revenue. $92,895K (2024), $293,884K (2023), $159,176K (2022). Terminated effective Jun 20, 2024.

sub_families.name: pos_charges
sub_families.details: POS usage and maintenance from affiliate: $7,305K (2024), $15,454K (2023), $8,715K (2022).

sub_families.name: non_cash_transactions
sub_families.details: $43,493K non-cash contributions from affiliate, $16,392K non-cash distributions to affiliate in 2024.

sub_families.name: intercompany_balances
sub_families.details: Due to/from affiliates: noninterest bearing, no specific repayment date, expected to be satisfied within 12 months. Classified as current.

sub_families.name: incentive_programs
sub_families.details: SWI incentive payment awards for executives/key employees through December 2026. Allocated to DAL based on percentage of franchise royalties.

note_families.key_facts: DAL (with SIP and SUIPH as co-Guarantors) irrevocably and unconditionally guarantees SPV Holdco's securitized notes: Series 2024-1 fixed rate $3,350,000K and Series 2024-3 fixed rate $2,335,000K outstanding as of Dec 31, 2024. Collateralized by substantially all revenue-generating assets. Also guarantees 2024-1 Class A-1-LR variable rate $93,000K and 2024-2 Class A-1-VFN revolving $400,000K committed capacity. Prior $400M revolving facility (Feb 2022) settled at acquisition date.
Defendant in lawsuits and arbitrations in ordinary course. Management believes resolution will not have material adverse impact on financial position, results, or cash flows.
Evaluated through April 25, 2025. No material subsequent events requiring recognition or additional disclosure.
